title: Finn and the Baby Animals
synopsis: Little Finn discovers adorable baby animals in the warm savanna and learns their sounds and movements through gentle interactions.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm grass. Look! A baby elephant!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden savanna grass toward a cute baby elephant, painted in warm orange sunset colors with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn approaching a baby elephant in golden grassland

pages.text: The baby elephant says TRUMPET! Finn giggles.

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene of a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes laughing as an expressive baby elephant trumpets, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn giggling at a trumpeting baby elephant

pages.text: A baby giraffe stretches up high. So tall!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looking up at a tall baby giraffe against an orange sunset sky in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn looking up at a tall baby giraffe

pages.text: The baby zebra has pretty stripes. Black and white!

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache image of a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes petting a striped baby zebra in golden grass, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn petting a baby zebra with black and white stripes

pages.text: A baby lion says ROAR! But it sounds little and cute.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching an adorable baby lion roaring, painted in warm orange sunset colors with expressive animals and thick brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Finn watching a cute baby lion roaring

pages.text: Finn loves all the baby animals. Time to go home!

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with thick brushstrokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to all the baby animals in the golden grass savanna with warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to baby animals in the savanna

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the baby elephant make?
questions.explanation: Baby elephants make a trumpet sound with their trunks!

questions.question: What colors are the baby zebra's stripes?
questions.explanation: Zebras have beautiful black and white stripes!

questions.question: Which baby animal is very tall?
questions.explanation: Baby giraffes are very tall with long necks!
